title: Citrus Indulgent Korean Jackfruit Bowl
description: A chewy, savory jackfruit bowl infused with bright orange juice and Korean spices, finished in the air fryer for a crispy finish.
instructions: Rinse the shredded jackfruit under cold water and pat dry with a towel.
In a bowl, whisk together orange juice, soy sauce, maple syrup, gochujang, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger to make the sauce.
Toss the dried jackfruit in the sauce until fully coated and let it marinate for 10 minutes.
Preheat your air fryer to 375°F (190°C). Spread the marinated jackfruit in a single layer in the basket.
Air‑fry for 15 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through, until the fruit pieces are golden and slightly crisp.
While the jackfruit cooks, assemble the bowl: spoon a serving of cooked brown rice into each bowl, top with air‑fried jackfruit, sliced avocado, a sprinkle of cilantro, and toasted sesame seeds.
Serve immediately, optionally with a splash of extra orange juice or a drizzle of sesame oil.
